subject: fix(pwa): fix 3 bugs found in code review
body:
1. usePWAInstall: consumeEarlyCapturedEvent() race condition — was called
   inside useState initializer, meaning multiple component mounts would race
   to delete the same window property (second mount gets null). Fixed by
   moving consumption to module level (runs once at import time).

2. usePWAUpdate: offlineReady auto-dismiss missing notifyListeners() — when
   the 3-second timer cleared _offlineReady, sibling components subscribed
   to the module-level listener were never notified of the state change.

3. InstallInstructionsModal: 'unknown' browser type fell through to Chrome
   desktop instructions ("Click the install icon in the address bar") which
   is incorrect for unrecognized browsers. Added explicit generic fallback.

Tags: bugfix, pwa, code-review
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: claude-md-alignment
Semver: patch
